they base their conclusions on the static analysis of the code structure, ABI, bytecode, and lack of suspicious patterns.\n\n7. **Score consistency:**  \n   - The scores are consistent with the analysis: malware = 0, obfuscated = 0, risk = low.\n\n---\n\n### Overall assessment:\n\n- **Malware score:** **0** — No malicious activity detected.\n- **Obfuscated score:** **0** — The code is straightforward, autogenerated boilerplate.\n- **Risk score:** **0.1** — Very low, reflecting the nature of the code as a deployment utility without security concerns.\n\n### Final thoughts:\n\nGiven the detailed analysis, I concur with the reports' conclusions.
